markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss team structure, quality expectations, and client management strategies for GrowthX's content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current team structure needs realignment: Directors should lead strategy and client relationships, MEs execute and delegate to CMs, CMs focus on execution](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Quality expectations and client communication need improvement, especially for high-budget clients](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [New work streams (e.g. backlinks, PSEO) were sold before fully developed, causing some challenges](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [More systematic approach needed for developing content strategies and onboarding new clients](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

## Topics

### Current Team Structure Challenges

  - [Misalignment in roles: CMs sometimes communicating with clients, MEs trying to drive strategy](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [New team members (directors, MEs, CMs) onboarding simultaneously while trying to deliver for clients](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Some key team members (e.g. Jess, Jürgen, Pratik) working long hours to compensate](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Ideal Team Structure and Workflow

  - [Directors: Lead strategy, client relationships for first 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Managing Editors (MEs): Gradually take over from directors, delegate to CMs](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Content Managers (CMs): Focus on execution, not client-facing](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Protected time needed for team training and workflow learning](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Need for more thoughtful, research-based approach to content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Example given of FathomAI strategy development process](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Utilize tools like Perplexity, ChatGPT, and internal workflows for research](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Directors should drive initial strategy, then delegate to MEs and CMs](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### Client Onboarding and Expectations

  - [More time needed upfront to understand client's product, audience, and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Develop clear content clusters and assignments before presenting to clients](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Show progress across multiple areas for high-budget clients](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### New Work Streams and Services

  - [Backlinks and PSEO sold before fully developed](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Need to position new services more robustly (e.g. combine backlinking with distribution, PR, ghostwriting)](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [Balance between selling new services and optimizing for retention/expansion](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

### Team Member Development

  - [Pratik (senior CM) needs support in client communication and strategy presentation](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Sadira (experienced CM) has potential for promotion to ME, needs evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=3199.0)
  - [New ME starting May 19th, will need training time](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=3078.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Branko to take more active role in driving strategy for all clients, especially high-budget ones](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Develop more systematic approach for content strategy creation and client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Evaluate team structure and consider additional support for Pratik's projects](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=3039.0)
  - [Assess Sadira's potential for promotion to ME role](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=3199.0)
  - [Prepare for onboarding of new ME starting May 19th](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=3078.0)
  - [Implement protected time for team training on workflows and tools](https://fathom.video/share/peJATeetcktvuf7d78fQ7QFpNHfrHVYf?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
